headline: Can Franklin Resources (BEN) Turn Retirement Advantage Plus Into a Durable Edge in Active Asset Management?
summary: Earlier in March, Franklin Resources reported that assets under management rose to about US$1.74 trillion as of February 28, 2026, helped by stronger markets and roughly US$10 billion of long-term net inflows, while Western Asset Management’s US$221 billion AUM reflected mixed flows. The launch of Retirement Advantage Plus Funds, which add private real estate and private credit to a recognized target-date series, underscores Franklin Resources’ effort to broaden retirement offerings and...
